results.title: What Tocqueville’s idea of association says about America at 250
Xenophobia: 801 Nigerians evacuated from South Africa as Air Peace completes third mission
results.description: The total number of Nigerians evacuated from South Africa following xenophobic attacks has risen to 801, following the successful completion of a third humanitarian evacuation mission by Air Peace. The returnees were evacuated across three humanitarian operations, with the airline airlifting 262 Nigerians on June 11, 271 on June 30, and 268 on July 3, [...] The post Xenophobia: 801 Nigerians evacuated from South Africa as Air Peace completes third mission appeared first on Tribune Online .

results.title: At 250, America is still deciding who belongs
results.description: Birthright citizenship survived, but the fight over who is fully recognised as American is far from over.
